name: PennySynth: RAG-Driven Data Synthesis for Automated Quantum Code Generation

description: arXiv:2605.25572v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: The growing complexity of quantum programming frameworks has exposed a critical limitation in existing large language model (LLM)-based code assistants: general-purpose models hallucinate PennyLane-specific gate names, misplace device configurations, and produce structurally invalid circuits when faced with specialized quantum coding cha...
author: Minghao Shao, Nouhaila Innan, Hariharan Janardhanan, Muhammad Kashif, Alberto Marchisio, Muhammad Shafique
